fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 60 is inverted. Clamping is performed when `clamp` is `False` and skipped when `clamp` is `True`, which is the opposite of the intended behavior.

spec.expr: (clamp and y__3 == min(max(y__1, min(y0, y1)), max(y0, y1))) or (not clamp and y__3 == y__1)

constraints.intent: Ensures the result after the conditional block is clamped if and only if clamp is true.

spec.expr: (clamp and y__3 == min(max(y__1, min(y0, y1)), max(y0, y1))) or (not clamp and y__3 == y__1)

constraints.intent: Verifies that the value entering the precision check is correctly clamped based on the clamp flag.
The clamping logic branch should only be executed if clamp is True.
